title: juncus pygmaeus
intro: Juncus pygmaeus, also known as Dwarf Rush, is a small, perennial plant species belonging to the Juncaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues, as it has been used in traditional medicine to aid in digestion and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Juncus pygmaeus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve overall gut health, making it a sought-after ingredient in herbal remedies. Juncus pygmaeus is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be dried and used as a powder in herbal supplements and capsules.
